    • Interpreting chronic AmsPAF outputs

Generate a sequence of focal dates for chronic AmsPAF computation

Source: R/chronic.R
expand_focal_dates.Rd

A thin convenience wrapper around base::seq.Date() for generating the focal_dates vector passed to time_weighted_aggregate(). The most common use is a daily sequence for time-series analysis.

Usage

expand_focal_dates(start, end, by = "day")

Arguments

start

Start date (character "YYYY-MM-DD" or Date).

end

End date (character "YYYY-MM-DD" or Date).

by

Increment. Passed to base::seq.Date(). Common values: "day", "week", "month". Default "day".

Value

A Date vector from start to end at the specified increment.

Examples

if (FALSE) { # \dontrun{
# Daily sequence for 2024–2025
focal_dates <- expand_focal_dates("2024-01-01", "2025-12-31", by = "day")

chr_chem <- time_weighted_aggregate(imp, focal_dates = focal_dates)
} # }
